query: I was actually told that I didn’t need to get insurance this time because my previous trip with your agency had insurance. Is there really nothing that can be done? I just want to make sure I’m not missing any options before I give up on getting my money back.

state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: The user wants to cancel a reservation.
assistant: The assistant asks for the user ID and reservation ID.
user: The user provides user ID emma_kim_9957 and reservation ID EHGLP3.
assistant: The assistant retrieves the reservation details and explains that the booking is a basic-economy itinerary made more than 24 hours earlier without travel insurance, so it does not qualify for a refund under the policy.
user: The user pushes back, saying they were told prior insurance coverage meant they did not need new insurance, and asks whether any refund option is still available.

candidate_answers.text: I understand why you want to double-check. Let me review your traveler profile to see whether there’s any visible account context that could affect the cancellation options before I answer definitively.

The reservation details are already known, and the user is now challenging whether any account-level context could change the outcome, so the most grounded next step is to inspect the user record rather than repeat the same reservation lookup.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Use airline only for diversity and select a state where reservation facts are already known but the user asks whether any account-level context could still create an exception worth checking.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible state. Scores reflect which action best responds to the user’s request to verify whether any remaining refund avenue exists without assuming hidden policy overrides.
notes: query is copied from the visible user appeal after an initial policy explanation
history_summary excludes the later user-profile retrieval result and final assistant response
best_action is get_user_details because the reservation has already been inspected and the user is asking whether account context changes anything
This sample provides domain diversity and a different best-action type from the retail and telecom lookups
